mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, title AS title, cover AS cover, t_price AS t_price, `type` AS type, 0 AS isTry FROM osh_course WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT id, title, cover, t_price, 'column' as `type`, 0 as isTry FROM osh_column WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
